title: MC Legacy (Beta RPG)
description: ⚔️ What if Beta 1.7.3 was a MMORPG? ⚔️
body:
## Features  
Spoiler -   Free online playability thanks to e4mc!    -   Dragons everywhere! Thanks Ice and Fire mod! -   Enchantment transferring! -   Faster Minecarts! -   New & improved cave system!   -   New Chestplate type: Bracers!   -   New Dimensions ( Aether / The Undergarden )   -   Revamped crossbow; bolts instead of arrows!   -   Reverted to old 1.9 spammy combat era!   -   Reverted to 1.7.3 Beta terrain generation!   -   Spell-books and more magic content!   -   Triggered events such as blood moons!
  ### Author Permission Credits Player Trading mod made by [Zetal](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/zetal/projects)
permission ![player_trading](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a436197953754550a5a210ff8fd70fc97e66808.png)
Property Modifier made by [IchHabeHunger54](https://www.curseforge.com/members/ichhabehunger54/projects)
